description: Discover cities via get_available_routes, extract city_id from descriptors, search and select a flight

steps.thought: The last observation showed two cities: Aeloria (city_id: city_synth_001_0000) and Brindor (city_id: city_synth_001_0001). The user wants to fly from Aeloria to Brindor on 2026-06-01 for 2 passengers. I'll search using these exact city_ids.
The last observation showed one direct flight at $480 total for 2 passengers — this fits the budget. Per the BOOKING RULE, I must call select_flight now before moving on to hotel search.

description: Hotel search with budget filter, booking, then concluding with Action: DONE and a full Itinerary block

steps.thought: The last observation showed the flight to Brindor is confirmed at $480. Now I need a hotel in Brindor (city_id: city_synth_001_0001) for June 1–4 (3 nights) for 2 guests. Remaining budget is $4180 - $480 = $3700. I'll set max_price_per_night to $3700 / 3 ≈ $1233 to filter out unaffordable hotels.
The last observation showed two hotels. Harbour View Boutique at $175/night ($525 total) fits comfortably within budget. I'll book it now before moving to activities.

The last observation showed hotel booking confirmed at $525. All required bookings are done: flight ($480) + hotel ($525) = $1005 total, well within the $4180 budget. I'll produce the final itinerary now.
